title: calyptrocalyx micholitzii
intro: Calyptrocalyx micholitzii, also known as the 'umbrella fern', is a type of plant species belonging to the family Arecaceae. Traditionally, the plant's leaves have been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calyptrocalyx micholitzii are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be consumed as a tea or used in a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
